title: ProjectUpdater full JSON backup export + import (complete IDEA-0015 data-loss mitigation)
description: DEC-028 first software-delivery slice. IDEA-0015's export shipped in TASK-136 but only as a LOSSY status snapshot (exportStatus() drops id/goal/nextAction/points/streak/reminderDays/lastVisited/dueDate), so it cannot restore state. Add a FULL backup Export + Import of the complete internal model (the STORE_KEY localStorage payload / db) to actually mitigate the registered localStorage data-loss risk. Keep the existing 'Export status' button unchanged (different purpose: tool interop). Add 'Export backup' (full db as JSON) and 'Import backup' (read file -> normalizeData -> save -> render), with a confirm-overwrite guard before replacing existing data. Single-file app: Projects/ProjectUpdater/app/index.html.
acceptance_criteria: A full-fidelity backup export writes the COMPLETE internal model (all project fields incl. id, goal, nextAction, points, streak, reminderDays, lastVisited, dueDate), not the lossy status snapshot.
Import reads a backup file, runs it through normalizeData, saves to localStorage, and re-renders; a confirm-overwrite prompt guards against silently replacing existing data.
Round-trip proven: export backup -> modify/clear -> import backup restores identical state (documented in the verification artifact).
The existing 'Export status' button and exportStatus() are unchanged; no other files touched.
objective: Complete IDEA-0015's deferred data-loss mitigation: add a full-fidelity JSON backup export + import to ProjectUpdater so a user can save and restore their complete project data, closing the registered localStorage data-loss risk.
required_context: Projects/ProjectUpdater/app/index.html (single-file app: STORE_KEY='projectUpdater.v1' line 339; load() line 417; save() line 431; normalizeData() line 367; existing exportStatus() line 1081; export button markup line 295)
MAP_System/shared/decisions.md DEC-028 (why this is the first software-delivery slice)
forbidden_changes: Do not modify or remove the existing 'Export status' button or exportStatus() (that is a separate tool-interop feature).
Do not change the STORE_KEY value or the on-disk data schema.
Do not add a build step, framework, server, or external dependency — the app must stay a single self-contained index.html opened directly in a browser.
Do not edit any file outside files_in_scope.
expected_artifacts: Updated Projects/ProjectUpdater/app/index.html with 'Export backup' + 'Import backup' controls and their handlers.
reviewer_role: reviewer (a core agent other than the implementer and other than gune; prefer a Claude core agent for UI/UX + risk review, cross-model)
risk: Low-to-medium. Client-side only, no data schema change. Main risks: (1) import overwriting data without confirmation — mitigated by a confirm guard; (2) malformed file handling — validate JSON + run through normalizeData and fail safely without corrupting existing state.
